evals.prompt: Write the non-functional requirements for a new financial trading API. It needs to be extremely fast, highly available, and secure.
evals.expected_output: An NFR document tailored for a high-performance financial system.
expectations: Specifies strict performance targets (e.g., p99 latency < 50ms)
Specifies high availability targets (e.g., 99.99% uptime, multi-region)
Includes strict security constraints (e.g., MTLS, encryption at rest)
Uses a structured format like tables with Requirement IDs
